description_long: This is a large, modern house with a flat roof and multiple outdoor amenities, including a tennis court, swimming pool, and a covered patio area. The main building is rectangular and features clean, white facades with minimalistic windows and doors. The property includes landscaped areas with trees, a driveway with parked vehicles, and a fenced perimeter around the tennis court. There is a secondary structure adjacent to the main house, likely serving as a pool house or guest area, and several outdoor seating and lounging zones. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, and the entryway is understated, blending into the overall modern aesthetic. The house is designed for luxury living, with ample recreational and relaxation spaces integrated into the property.
description: A large, modern white house with a flat roof, tennis court, pool, and landscaped outdoor areas, featuring minimalistic design and multiple recreational amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tennis court, main house facade, pool, and covered patio area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, outdoor lounge, and secondary structure adjacent to the main house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, driveway, parked vehicles, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, entryway, and tennis court perimeter.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with flat door, small steps, and no prominent porch or decorative elements.
